productDisplayName: French Connection Women Cream & Black Belt
description: Style NoteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers or jeans, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This belt from french connection is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Product DetailsTang clasp with a fixed leather loop and a fabric covered buckle with a pleated design to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeBroad base with a braided design to sit snug on the waistMaterial and CareBody:100% cotton/ Trim: 100% polyurethaneWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
